measurement_note: Size is N, the string length. The 3/6/12 legal tiers use distinct characters, so the Accepted short-first branch-and-bound search establishes the maximum N immediately and prunes every remaining branch. An independent branch-and-bound implementation has the same scaling. A correct exhaustive boundary-mask implementation performs O(N^2 2^N) work by rebuilding every partition and pairwise-checking its pieces, completes all three tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
